content: Solana Actions = HTTPS endpoints (spec: solana.com/docs/advanced/actions). GET returns ActionGetResponse {icon,title,description,label,disabled?,links.actions[],error?}. Each LinkedAction has href+label+parameters[] (text/email/url/number/date/checkbox/radio/select/textarea with pattern validation). POST body {account:base58 pubkey} returns ActionPostResponse {transaction:base64,message?,links.next?}. Client must base64-decode, deserialize, set feePayer+recentBlockhash if unsigned, re-serialize, sign with wallet adapter, send to RPC. If partially signed client must NOT alter feePayer/blockhash; reject malformed/malicious txs. Chaining via links.next (PostNextActionLink with same-origin callback returning signature+account, or InlineNextActionLink). types: 'action' (interactive) or 'completed' (terminal). actions.json at domain root maps site pathPatterns -> apiPaths, must return Access-Control-Allow-Origin:*. SDK @solana/actions; CORS headers Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET,POST,PUT,OPTIONS
